summary: Verified Display Layout tab feature implementation. All 18 navigation UI elements are present across 3 categories (Navigation, Panels, Signs). Show All/Hide All/Reset buttons work correctly. Trip Panel Position toggle (LEFT/RIGHT) functions properly. Changes persist after navigating away and back. Display tab is correctly positioned between 'Fuel Network' and 'Settings' in sidebar.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: HudLayoutView.tsx - 18 HUD elements defined with proper data-testid attributes
VERIFIED: Sidebar.tsx - Display menu item with LayoutPanelTop icon positioned at index 8 (between Fuel Network and Settings)
VERIFIED: App.tsx - HudLayoutView lazy import and ViewType.HUD_LAYOUT case in renderContent()
VERIFIED: types.ts - HudLayoutConfig interface with 18 boolean properties + tripPanelPosition
VERIFIED: utils/hudLayout.ts - localStorage persistence with 'nav_hud_layout' key
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx - hudLayout state with event listener for 'hud-layout-changed' custom event

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: App at https://cmv-routing-dev.preview.emergentagent.com. Display Layout feature verified working. Key data-testids: hud-layout-view (main container), hud-show-all-btn, hud-hide-all-btn, hud-reset-btn, trip-panel-left-btn, trip-panel-right-btn, and hud-toggle-{key} for each of 18 elements. Navigation category: showNavigationHUD, showLaneGuidance, showSpeedOverlay, showArrivalHUD, showManeuverPreview. Panels category: showFuelCost, showHosStatus, showMapControls, showRouteComparison, showWeatherOverlay. Signs category: showHighwayShields, showSpeedLimitSigns, showExitSigns, showCurveWarnings, showCmvWarnings, showTruckRestrictions, showTrafficIncidents, showWaypointMarkers. Settings persist in localStorage under 'nav_hud_layout' key.

display_tab_sidebar_position.details: Display tab appears at index 8 in sidebar, between Fuel Network (7) and Settings (9)

display_layout_view.details: HudLayoutView renders with header 'Display Layout' and description text

visible_counter.details: 18/18 visible counter shown at top, updates correctly when elements are toggled

show_all_button.details: Clicking Show All sets all 18 elements to visible, counter shows 18/18

hide_all_button.details: Clicking Hide All sets all 18 elements to hidden, counter shows 0/18

reset_button.details: Clicking Reset restores default visibility (all 18 visible), counter shows 18/18

trip_panel_position_toggle.details: LEFT/RIGHT buttons toggle correctly with gold background indicating active state

individual_element_toggle.details: Clicking element row toggles visibility, eye icon changes between Eye and EyeOff

navigation_category.details: 5 elements: Turn Instructions, Lane Guidance, Speed Display, Arrival Bar, Maneuver Preview

panels_category.details: 5 elements: Fuel Cost, HOS Status, Map Controls, Route Comparison, Weather Overlay

signs_category.details: 8 elements: Highway Shields, Speed Limit Signs, Exit Signs, Curve Warnings, CMV Warnings, Truck Restrictions, Traffic Incidents, Waypoint Numbers

persistence.details: Changes persist after navigating away to Dashboard and back to Display tab
